---
title: "Contact"
format: html
---

For any questions regarding the digital Qualtrics survey or this website, please reach out to the following contacts:


<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 2rem; flex-wrap: nowrap; margin-top: 2rem;">

<div style="border-radius: 15px; border: 3px solid #50aeb3ff; background-color: #001743; flex: 1 1 0; min-width: 0; max-width: 350px; padding: 0.5rem; text-align: center;">
<i class="bi bi-person-circle" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #50aeb3ff;"></i>

<p style="margin: 0.1rem 0 0.1rem 0; font-size: 1.1rem; color: white;"><strong>Raymond Hunter</strong></p>

<p style="margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0; font-size: 0.9rem; color: white;">Data Analyst</p>

<p style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.9rem;"><a href="mailto:raymond.hunter@noaa.gov" style="color: #50aeb3ff; text-decoration: none;">raymond.hunter@noaa.gov</a></p>
</div>

<div style="border-radius: 15px; border: 3px solid #50aeb3ff; background-color: #001743; flex: 1 1 0; min-width: 0; max-width: 350px; padding: 0.5rem; text-align: center;">
<i class="bi bi-person-circle" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #50aeb3ff;"></i>

<p style="margin: 0.1rem 0 0.1rem 0; font-size: 1.1rem; color: white;"><strong>Samantha Werner</strong></p>

<p style="margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0; font-size: 0.9rem; color: white;">Economist</p>

<p style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.9rem;"><a href="mailto:samanthawerner@noaa.gov" style="color: #50aeb3ff; text-decoration: none;">samanthawerner@noaa.gov</a></p>
</div>

<div style="border-radius: 15px; border: 3px solid #50aeb3ff; background-color: #001743; flex: 1 1 0; min-width: 0; max-width: 350px; padding: 0.5rem; text-align: center;">
<i class="bi bi-person-circle" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #50aeb3ff;"></i>

<p style="margin: 0.1rem 0 0.1rem 0; font-size: 1.1rem; color: white;"><strong>Elizabeth Conley</strong></p>

<p style="margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0; font-size: 0.9rem; color: white;">Social Scientist</p>

<p style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.9rem;"><a href="mailto:elizabeth.conley@noaa.gov" style="color: #50aeb3ff; text-decoration: none;">elizabeth.conley@noaa.gov</a></p>
</div>

</div>
